# Axecode — LLM Full Context

Axecode is a full-cycle software development team focused on business outcomes.

## What we build
1. Business websites and landing pages
2. Web applications (CRM, SaaS, client cabinets, B2B/B2C portals)
3. Mobile applications (iOS/Android)
4. E-commerce solutions (catalog, checkout, payment and integrations)
5. Technical support and post-launch growth

## Delivery approach
- Discovery and business goals alignment
- UX/UI and prototyping
- Development and integrations
- QA and release
- Ongoing support and product evolution
